titleStmt.title: SII 38.33: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 33. (A.R. No. 33 of 1912.) SATYAVĒḌU, PONNERI TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a stone built into a well, infront of Mātaṅgēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Year 1608, Akshaya, śrāvaṇa śu. di. 15, Saturday

summary.p: It records the gift of a well and garden with the blessings of Lord Srī Rāma and also a certain Tolappachāryya by Kṛishṇa Reḍḍi, who is stated to have belonged to Pantavamsakula and to Madhurāntaka-gōtra. It also furnishes the geneology of the donor.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1608 Agunēṭi Akṣaya nāma saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa śuddha 15 sthiravāramunāḍu tiru
mala tōḷappācāryulaina paṁṭavaṁśāvataṁsulayina madhurāṁtaka gōtrajulayina śrīpeṭa kṛṣṇāreḍḍikumāriḍu nārāreḍḍiki pōlamaku ja
nmiṁcina yellāreḍḍi Ā yellāreḍḍiki liṁgamakkaku janmiṁcina kṛṣṇāreḍḍi Ā kṛṣṇāreḍḍiki yimmaṭakkaku janmiṁcina yellāreḍḍi Āyellāreḍḍiki yīśvaravāka gō
traṁ dēvāreḍḍi nāgāreḍḍi kumā¨rte Akkammaku janmiṁcina Ayyapareḍḍi kṛṣṇāreḍḍi vīrāreḍḍi nāgāreḍḍi gaṁgāreḍḍi raṁgapareḍḍi yī Ārugurilō śrīmadanaṁta
kalyāṇa guṇa paripū¨rṇulaina rājaśrīpeṭa gaṁgāreḍḍigāru dēsūri sthaḷaṁ yēli dēsūri vāranē kī¨rtivahiṁcina yadēsūripeṭa gaṁgāreḍḍigāriki gēdu
rupāla gōtraṁ dhuvūri kāḷāreḍḍi kumā¨rte tulaśammaku janmiṁcina rājaśrī rāmāreḍḍi Ābā¨rlareḍḍi nāgāreḍḍi kṛṣṇāreḍḍi yī kṛṣṇāreḍḍi Agrajānuma
ticēta tamataṁḍri gaṁgāreḍḍigāriki sukṛtamugā sēyiṁcina Ārāma dī¨rghikā pratiṣṭhādha¨rmamu śrīrāmakṛpacē Ācaṁdrā¨rkasthāyigā va¨rdhillugāka .
Digital edition of SII 38.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
